title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Babyoye Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Babyoye Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Babyoye Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Mumbai-based team.

About Babyoye Global Group:
Babyoye Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Babyoye Global Group!
